meaning: n.琛拌触,鍨彴,澶ч洦,钀戒笅
examples: His pride may still be his downfall.
His lack of experience had led to his downfall.
There was a certain amount of rough justice in his downfall.
The front-page newspaper expose that would begin his downfall was still 14 weeks away.
This past week, California Senator Diane Feinstein said she believes that case contributed to Lam's downfall.
